final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: phone wallpaper, 9:16 vertical crop
Primary request: extreme macro close-up of a water droplet reflecting the world within, surrounded by grass blades and dewdrops
Scene/backdrop: lush green grass meadow, circular bokeh orbs in background creating dreamy atmosphere
Subject: single pristine water droplet acting as a natural lens, refracting inverted miniature landscape inside
Style/medium: macro photography, photorealistic nature documentary style
Composition/framing: extreme close-up macro, shallow depth of field, droplet centered as focal point
Lighting/mood: soft morning diffused light, ethereal and delicate mood celebrating nature's intricacy
Color palette: fresh greens, crystal clear water transparency, warm golden bokeh highlights
Materials/textures: spherical water surface tension, dewy grass blades with visible veins, smooth refractive droplet surface
Constraints: keep the water droplet as the hero element with visible internal reflection, circular bokeh must be prominent in background
Avoid: flat lighting, oversaturated colors, artificial plastic look, watermark, text overlay
